result.stdout:
Description:
  Moq to NSubstitute conversion tool

Usage:
  moq2nsub [command] [options]

Options:
  --version       Show version information
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

Commands:
  convert  Converts a dotnet test project from using Moq to NSubstitute

result.stdout:
Description:
  Converts a dotnet test project from using Moq to NSubstitute

Usage:
  moq2nsub convert [options]

Options:
  --project-path <project-path> (REQUIRED)  Target path that contains test project to convert.
  -?, -h, --help                            Show help and usage information
